stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
GEN 1 suffers from a voltage overload and as a result the internal exciter breaker opens. The flight crew are instructed to switch off the generator using the overhead push button. The new configuration will be…

options.a: Generator breaker 1 (C 1-1) opens and both bus-tie-breakers close.
options.b: GEN 1 is disconnected from the constant speed drive unit (CSDU).
options.c: AC BUS 1 is now fed directly from the ESS AC.
options.d: TRU 1 is automatically taken offline due to the increased load on GEN 2.
